where.if: AND (event_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR detail LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, event_type AS eventType, ip, detail, created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT au.username FROM admin_users au WHERE au.id = security_logs.user_id) AS userName FROM security_logs
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, event_type AS eventType, ip, detail, created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT au.username FROM admin_users au WHERE au.id = security_logs.user_id) AS userName FROM security_logs
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO security_logs (user_id, event_type, ip, detail, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{eventType}, #{ip}, #{detail}, NOW())
